title: Airbnb Q2 2025 Financial Results
text: Q2 revenue was $3.1 billion, up 13% year-over-year. Revenue reached $3.1 billion, exceeding the projected $3.03 billion. Airbnb's Q2 EPS of $1.03 outperformed the forecast of $0.93, marking a 10.75% surprise. Q2 net income grew 16% Y/Y to $642 million, representing a 21% net income margin. Q2 Adjusted EBITDA grew 17% Y/Y to $1.0 billion, representing a 34% Adjusted EBITDA Margin. Airbnb has set a revenue guidance of $4.02-$4.1 billion for Q3 2025, representing an 8-10% growth. The company plans to maintain an adjusted EBITDA margin of at least 34.5% for the full year. Strategic investments include $200 million in new business initiatives, focusing on AI integration and travel search enhancements. The summer 2025 release represented the company's largest launch to date for new Services and Experiences offerings. Initial reception was positive with services and experiences achieving 4.93 star ratings.
